erraswarm/accessors/trunk/accessors and rerun ./configure checking for ant... /usr/local/bin/ant [$[Get Code]] The above is ok. Runtime Behaviours Anonymous PTII SVN, No access to the repo If the user does not have access to the accessors repo and th

does not have access to the accessors repo and then reload an accessor, vergil hangs! Edward wrote: "But then, in vergil, Import Accessor also asks on stdout/in for the password. No matter what I enter, the exec process hangs and I have to quit verg

er, the exec process hangs and I have to quit vergil. Same thing happens in capecode if I try to expand the accessor library." bash-3.2$ $PTII / bin / vergil org / terraswarm / accessor / demo / Camera / Camera.xml 8297 ms. Memory: 333312K Free: 2881

a / Camera.xml 8297 ms. Memory: 333312K Free: 288149K ( 86 % ) Checking out the accessors repository. In "/Users/cxbrooks/ptII-anon/org/terraswarm/accessor" , about to execute: svn co https: // repo.eecs.berkeley.edu / svn / projects / terraswarm / a

ecs.berkeley.edu / svn / projects / terraswarm / accessors / trunk / accessors Password for 'cxbrooks' : Authentication realm: < https: // repo.eecs.berkeley.edu: 443 > UCB / EECS Subversion Repository [$[Get Code]] Solution: Modify JSAccessor.java t

y [$[Get Code]] Solution: Modify JSAccessor.java to invoke svn with --trust-server-cert --non-interactive . Also, the checkout or update keeps happening even after it fails. Solution: Modify JSAccessor.java so that it sets a static boolean if the che

r.java so that it sets a static boolean if the checkout or update fails. To reset the flag, restart the JVM. Below is a sample run, where we get a bunch of text the first time it fails and then nothing after each reload. [ cxbrooks @ terratest ptII-

ng after each reload. [ cxbrooks @ terratest ptII-anon ] $ $PTII / bin / vergil org / terraswarm / accessor / demo / StockTick / StockTick.xml Checking out the accessors repository. In "/home/cxbrooks/ptII-anon/org/terraswarm/accessor" , about to exe
